title: Water Quality: A Foundation for Health and Development
lede: Access to safe drinking water is essential for health and development, yet over 2 billion people, mostly in low- and middle-income countries, still lack it. Many remain exposed to contaminated water, which threatens health, livelihoods, and economic progress.
caption: Access to water from improved sources that is free from contamination (% of population), 2015–24

facts.text: people lacked access to safely managed drinking water in 2024.
